target.title: feat(memory-core): consume generic embedding providers
target.body:
## Summary

- Teach memory-core to resolve explicit embedding configs from the generic `embeddingProviders` contract added in #84947.
- Preserve the existing memory-specific adapter path and `auto` selection behavior, so generic providers are opt-in for memory until configured explicitly.
- Add non-mocked bridge proof using a virtual plugin that declares `contracts.embeddingProviders`, registers a generic provider through the real plugin API, and is consumed by memory-core through explicit config.

Stacked on #84947 via `mbelinky/84947-general-embedding-providers-base`.

## Verification

Behavior addressed: memory-core can consume a generic embedding provider by explicit provider id without changing memory auto-selection or overriding memory-specific providers.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout; Blacksmith Testbox through Crabbox on Linux (`tbx_01ks5qfqmvttp0prg28e7p01ng`, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26240537485). No live third-party endpoint was called in this PR.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/memory-core/src/memory/generic-embedding-provider.bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.test.ts src/plugins/contracts/embedding-provider.contract.test.ts src/plugins/embedding-provider-runtime.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/extensions-test-memory-generic-bridge.tsbuildinfo`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs extensions/memory-core/src/memory/generic-embedding-provider.bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.test.ts`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/memory-core/src/memory/generic-embedding-provider.bridge.test.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.ts extensions/memory-core/src/memory/embeddings.test.ts`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: Testbox passed 4 focused Vitest files / 15 tests, including the new non-mocked virtual-plugin bridge proof, memory-core adapter behavior tests, generic embedding provider contract tests, and runtime lookup tests; extension test typecheck, oxlint, oxfmt, and diff whitespace also passed.
Observed result after fix: a plugin-owned generic embedding provider with `contracts.embeddingProviders` is registered through the real plugin API, remains separate from memory-specific providers, is resolved by memory-core for explicit provider requests, maps `outputDimensionality` to generic `dimensions`, preserves runtime metadata, routes query calls as `inputType: "query"`, routes document batch and structured inputs as `inputType: "document"`, and leaves `auto` selection memory-specific.
What was not tested: no live third-party embedding endpoint was called here; that belongs to the follow-up OpenAI-compatible generic provider PR.
target.author: mbelinky

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
